name: @atomicmemory/openai-agents
description: AtomicMemory adapter for the OpenAI Agents SDK — pre-run memory retrieval, post-run ingest, and function tools.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').dependencies['@atomicmemory/sdk'];if(v.startsWith('file:')||v.startsWith('link:')){console.error('refusing to publish: @atomicmemory/sdk is '+v+'. Publish the SDK first, then pin to a registry version here.');process.exit(1)}"
